responses.electricityComment: After the Current transition to TVK government extended periods of power cuts max upto 15-17 hrs continuous
responses.roadComment: I live next to the ECR road. Therefore the main road is a highway. Smaller roads are decent until cor po oration decides to dig it up
responses.safetyComment: After a major incident govt installed security cameras to our road. Previously it was present in highways alone.
responses.loveText: Right next to the beach. So cheaper fish.
